---
title: "Redwood to Temescal"
---

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const title = document.querySelector(".quarto-title h1.title");
  if (!title) {
    return;
  }
  title.innerHTML = title.textContent.replace(
    /(\d+% Gravel)/g,
    '<span style="color: chocolate;">$1</span>',
  );
});
</script>
```


<a href="https://www.strava.com/activities/18234048917" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
  <i class="fa-brands fa-strava"></i> Example Strava effort
</a>

```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="San Leandro" data-miles="24.55" data-elevation="2958.33" data-time="167" data-road-quality="84" data-has-gravel="false">
<div class="mobile-route-heading">

<div class="mobile-route-tags"><span class="mobile-route-tag">Redwood Road ↑</span><span class="mobile-route-tag">Wildwood+Leimert ↓</span></div>
</div>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>San Leandro</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>24.55</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>2958.33 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~2:50</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.25 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#91cf60;">84%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Map

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart/overview_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>13.38</td>
      <td>55.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>4.40</td>
      <td>18.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>3.24</td>
      <td>13.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>1.94</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>1.34</td>
      <td>5.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.25</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Climbs

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Climbs Only

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,836</td>
      <td>6.6</td>
      <td>65 ± 30</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Lake Chabot Road (8% avg)</td>
      <td>138</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Walnut Road (7% avg)</td>
      <td>204</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>7 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Redwood Road (6% avg)</td>
      <td>611</td>
      <td>1.8</td>
      <td>21 ± 11</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Redwood Road (2% avg)</td>
      <td>117</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>5 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Redwood Road (2% avg)</td>
      <td>83</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Redwood Road (4% avg)</td>
      <td>402</td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>15 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>7. Redwood Road (6% avg)</td>
      <td>184</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>7 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>8. Linda Avenue (4% avg)</td>
      <td>95</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

### With Rest Periods

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,836</td>
      <td>24.6</td>
      <td>167 ± 61</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.3</td>
      <td>7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Lake Chabot Road (8% avg)</td>
      <td>138</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>3.1</td>
      <td>19</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Walnut Road (7% avg)</td>
      <td>204</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>7 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.7</td>
      <td>14</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Redwood Road (6% avg)</td>
      <td>611</td>
      <td>1.8</td>
      <td>21 ± 11</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Redwood Road (2% avg)</td>
      <td>117</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>5 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.8</td>
      <td>16</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Redwood Road (2% avg)</td>
      <td>83</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Redwood Road (4% avg)</td>
      <td>402</td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>15 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>7. Redwood Road (6% avg)</td>
      <td>184</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>7 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>5.9</td>
      <td>33</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>8. Linda Avenue (4% avg)</td>
      <td>95</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>6</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>13.1</td>
      <td>53.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>4.9</td>
      <td>19.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>2.7</td>
      <td>10.8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
      <td>6.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>4.6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>2.1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>2.1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
